author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Zelda: Ocarina of Time Nintendo Switch 2 remake was one of the most popular titles of Summer Game Fest 2026, according to data

Based on new data from LevelUp, it looks like the recently-announced remake of The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time was one of the most popular titles from Summer Game Fest 2026. LevelUp published a list of the best-performing games of the event. This is based on the most covered, watched, and discussed titles. Results are based on announcements between...

The post Zelda: Ocarina of Time Nintendo Switch 2 remake was one of the most popular titles of Summer Game Fest 2026, according to data appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Stellar Blade dev on bringing the game to Nintendo Switch 2, asked about bringing over Stellar Blade: Bloodrain

Stellar Blade developer ShiftUp has shared a few words about the just-announced Nintendo Switch 2 port and responded to a fan inquiry about Stellar Blade: Bloodrain. Stellar Blade will be arriving on Switch 2 in 2026 as revealed during this week’s Nintendo Direct. Edouard Akopcan, head of publishing at ShiftUp, said that the announcement was “a huge deal for our...

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
The Adventures of Elliot devs were surprised by fan reaction saying Faie talks too much

If there’s one thing that surprised the team behind The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales, it’s that players felt Faie talks too much. In the action RPG, Faie is a fairy companion who will accompany you on your journey. She even plays a role in combat with different abilities. Just like some players thought Navi from The Legend of...

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Tentacle Tango shares Nintendo Switch release date, new trailer

In the latest update from Cable Nest, the studio shared a release date for the Nintendo Switch version of Tentacle Tango. The game will be available on September 24, 2026. Tentacle Tango, a co-op precision platformer, was previously announced for Nintendo Switch last November. It was last said to be coming to the console sometime this year. Full cross-platform online...

The post Tentacle Tango shares Nintendo Switch release date, new trailer appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:
Nintendo confirms dungeons for Fire Emblem: Fortune’s Weave

According to Nintendo, dungeons will be a part of Fire Emblem: Fortune’s Weave. After the reveal several months ago, we finally got a major look at the game this week during the latest Nintendo Direct. A bunch of information was shared, but a few additional details have trickled in since. Much of the title focuses around the Heroic Games and...

text:
Sesame Street: Friends & Fun announced for Nintendo Switch

Outright Games and Infinigon Limited are partnering on the upcoming title Sesame Street: Friends & Fun, they’ve announced. Nintendo Switch is getting the game later this year. We have a confirmed release date of October 9, 2026. Sesame Street: Friends & Fun, inspired by the children’s series, is a 3D narrative adventure game for up to two players. As their...

text:
The Walking Dead: Streets of Survival announced for Nintendo Switch 2, Switch

Trailmark Games and Odaclick Game Studio today unveiled The Walking Dead: Streets of Survival, and it’s heading to both Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch. Launch timing will be provided at a later date. text:

text:
Heave Ho 2 locks in Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch release date, new trailer

Devolver Digital and Le Cartel are back with some news about Heave Ho 2 having shared the release date. On both Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch, it’ll be out on July 16, 2026.
